programme.desc: Denis Shapovalov and Stefanos Tsitsipas meet in an opening-round contest at Indian Wells. Shapovalov leads the head-to-head record 4-2, with his four wins coming on hard courts. (04.03)

programme.title: ATP Final: Acapulco
programme.desc: Frances Tiafoe targets a first ATP title since 2023 as the American meets fifth seed Flavio Cobolli in the Acapulco final. Tiafoe leads the pair's head-to-head record 2-0. (28.02)

programme.title: WTA Final: Dubai
programme.desc: Meeting for the first time in a final, 31-year-olds Jessica Pegula and Elina Svitolina vie for the Dubai crown. Svitolina bids to end an eight-year wait for her third title here. (21.02)

programme.title: ATP Final: Doha
programme.desc: Standing between Carlos Alcaraz, in the midst of an 11-game winning run, and a maiden Qatar Open title is the resurgent Arthur Fils - playing in his first final since 2024. (21.02)

programme.title: ATP Final: Rio
programme.desc: Alejandro Tabilo's sixth tour-level final, and first at ATP 500 level, sees the 28-year-old Chilean go up against Argentine eighth seed Tomas Martin Etcheverry for the Rio title. (21.02)

programme.title: Cumhachd Hitler/Hitler's Power
programme.desc: 3/3. Mar a chur Hitler na h-àrd chomandairean gu cogadh marbhteach. How Hitler committed his top commanders to a war of extermination. Contains graphic violence and disturbing scenes.

programme.title: Brunch le Abigail
programme.desc: 8/12. 'S e Lite am bracaist as fheàrr le Abigail airson a thoirt air falbh. Ach chan eil càil sìmplidh mun dòigh a th' aicese air a dhèanamh. Abigail's takeaway breakfast is porridge.

programme.title: Transatlantic Sessions: Dluth an Daimh
programme.desc: 3/6. With collaborative performances from Michael Doucet and Sharon Shannon, Darrell Scott and Karen Matheson as well as Iris DeMent and Emmylou Harris.

programme.title: Alba Today
programme.desc: Sealladh ùr bho Alba. A new view from Scotland.

programme.title: Alba Today
programme.desc: Sealladh ùr bho Alba. A new view from Scotland.

programme.title: Bing
programme.desc: 9/104. Tha Bing amharasach mu na faileasan a tha ga leantainn fhèin 's Flop mun ghàrradh. Bing is suspicious of the shadows that seem to following him and Flop round the garden.

programme.title: Bing
programme.desc: 10/104. Chan eil Bing air a dhòigh nach e a tha buannachadh an geama a thagh e fhèin a chluich. Bing is unhappy at not winning the game he himself chose to play.

programme.title: Sionnach agus Maigheach (Fox & Hare)
programme.desc: 8/26. Brush invites Hare, Fox, Owl and Tusk for a fancy game of croquet. Jack shows up uninvited and wants to play, too.

programme.title: 'S E Iasg a Th'Annam (I'm a Fish)
programme.desc: 1/52. Tha an t-iasg-bogsaig ag innse mu dèidhinn fhèin an-diugh. The boxfish is telling us all about herself today.

programme.title: Cleasan Ataidh & Tilidh/The...
programme.desc: ...Adventures of Abney & Teal. 29/52. Neep's friends and relations come for a visit, but their digging soon causes a few problems around the island.

programme.title: Peicein/Petit
programme.desc: 5/26. Petit and his friends want to ride the 'space' rollercoaster at the theme park, but they are not tall enough.

programme.title: Stòiridh
programme.desc: 79/82. A bedtime story for young children. Mairi Morrison reads Tha Frankie a' Tighinn, written and illustrated by Tim Hopgood and translated into Gaelic by Jo MacDonald.

programme.title: An Doimhne/The Deep
programme.desc: 8/13. Tha Alpheus Benthos ri miastadh - tha e a' feuchainn ris an Ephemychron a ghoid. Alpheus Benthos is up to no good, he is trying to steal the Ephemychron.

programme.title: An Sgoil
programme.desc: 3/6. It's a new day, and news is spreading about Mr Mackle. In the art and drama classroom, it looks as though the collaboration isn't working for Ms NicArtair.

programme.title: Naidheachdan Neònach CBBC ALBA
programme.desc: 1/2. Ellen NicDhòmhnaill le taghadh de na naidheachdan as annasaiche a tha ri chluinntinn air BBC ALBA. Ellen introduces her personal highlights from the craziest news show on BBC ALBA!

programme.title: An Saoghal Droil aig Pol...
programme.desc: ...Ploc/The Rubbish World of Dave Spud. 44/52. Dave swallows an apple pip and turns into a tree.

programme.title: Golf: Mun Cuairt Alba
programme.desc: 1/6. A journey around Scotland's golf courses. First up is a look at Fife courses, plus a top tip from Keil Beveridge and a meeting with professional golfer Laura Murray.

programme.title: SpeakGaelic
programme.desc: 21/26. Meg Bateman chats to Joy in the studio about philosophy and Calum Maclean is in Dumfries and Galloway visiting the Samye Ling Buddhist monastery and learning centre.

programme.desc: Naidheachdan ionadail, nàiseanta is eadar-nàiseanta gach là cuide ri fiosrachadh coimhearsnachd bho BBC ALBA. Local, national and international news and information from BBC ALBA.

programme.title: Rathad Ramsay

programme.title: Cuantan Caochlaideach/Seas in Motion
programme.desc: 1/4. A look at the marine dramas, great and small, that unfold across the North and Baltic Seas. Contains some scenes which some viewers may find upsetting.

programme.title: Skipinnish aig a' Chaisteal (Shorts)
programme.desc: 9/10. Skipinnish le Alive aig cuirm-chiùil bho Chaisteal Dhùn Èideann. Skipinnish perform Alive at a concert from Edinburgh Castle.

programme.title: Dàna | Scotland's Wild Side
programme.desc: 3/6. Coinneach MacFhraing make his first trip to the Island of Arran and enjoys discovering some of its ridges and precipices.

programme.title: Sar Sgeoil: Frankenstein
programme.desc: Cathy MacDonald finds out about Frankenstein's Scottish connections. Cathy Dhòmhnallach a'lorg ceanglaichean eadar Frankenstein agus Alba.

programme.title: OMC!

programme.desc: 1/9. Tha bacadh-cainnt air Kana ris an canar stad-cainnt 's tha i ag innse dhuinn mu dhèidhinn. Kana has a speech impediment which is called a stutter, and she tells us all about it.

programme.title: Boys from the Blackstuff

programme.title: Alien Files: Unsealed

programme.title: Alien Files: Unsealed
programme.desc: Recently declassified FBI files cast new light on the existence of aliens, as well as question whether the Vatican could be hiding proof of extra-terrestrial life. (S1, ep 2)

programme.title: Alien Files: Unsealed
programme.desc: Experts investigate why so many UFO sightings take place in Los Angeles, determining that the answer may lie underwater. (S1, ep 3)

programme.title: Alien Files: Unsealed
programme.desc: Previously sealed documents hint at compelling new theories about extraterrestrials. Could aliens be living among us? And could former US Presidents know something we don't? (S1, ep 4)

programme.title: Alien Files: Unsealed

programme.title: What On Earth?

programme.title: What On Earth?

programme.title: History's Greatest Mysteries

programme.title: History's Greatest Mysteries

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The Slaughterhouse: Peralta and Diaz try to earn the respect of their idol, Lt Melanie Hawkins, after accidentally disrupting one of her undercover cases.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Simpson Safari: The Simpsons win a holiday to Africa. But when Homer enrages a hippo, the trip soon becomes a dangerous adventure...

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Trilogy of Error: Homer gets his thumb sliced off while trying to steal a brownie. Lisa misses the school bus. Bart discovers Fat Tony's stash of smuggled fireworks.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The Star of the Backstage: Marge gets nostalgic about her days as stage manager of her high school play and reunites the cast for a re-run. They say you should never go back...

programme.title: MAFS UK Does Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Paul Liba hosts a sports-themed night with a riotous dessert, where everyone has to eat their pudding while wearing boxing gloves. Will his menu pack a punch? (Ep4/5)

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off...
programme.desc: ...for Stand Up To Cancer: Stacey Dooley, Jade Thirlwall, KSI and Katherine Ryan make cocktail-flavoured fondant fancies and create a showstopping biscuit and meringue scene.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: On the box this time, The Traitors, I'm a Celebrity... Get Me Out of Here!, Michael McIntyre's The Wheel, Planet Sex with Cara Delevingne and You Won't Believe This.

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Can metrosexual Jon find headstrong Mancunian Regan's soft side? Playboy Mostafa believes every girl would like to marry him. And heavy-metal fan Dan returns to the restaurant.

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Pansexual sex therapist Mariia's after a not-so-average Mr or Mrs who's not too tired for sex. Old romantic at heart Alannah seeks a forever fella who can speak her love language.

programme.desc: On the box this time, The Traitors, I'm a Celebrity... Get Me Out of Here!, Michael McIntyre's The Wheel, Planet Sex with Cara Delevingne and You Won't Believe This.

programme.desc: Your Honor: Captain Holt's mother seeks help from the precinct. Jeffords, Diaz and Boyle redecorate the breakroom. Santiago teaches Gina how to change a tyre.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The Slaughterhouse: Peralta and Diaz try to earn the respect of their idol, Lt Melanie Hawkins, after accidentally disrupting one of her undercover cases.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Recipe for Death II: Kiss the Cook: Adam asks Murray for money to film his own action movie, while Erica and Beverly go shopping for clothes.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Ho-ly K.I.T.T.: A shared love of the TV show Knight Rider brings Murray and his brother Marvin together. Beverly invites Lainey and Bill to Thanksgiving dinner.

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride: Revisited
programme.desc: Groom Billy shocked everyone with a piggy wedding for bride Steph in 2016. Now they look back on their oink-tastic big day. Is Billy still making up for a pig mistake? (Ep4)

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Whanex?: While preparing a presentation for his students about future goals, Cam must contend with a bully at the school. Jay has technical trouble during a video conference.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: We Need to Talk About Lily: Phil thinks he's found Pepper's dream home. Mitch and Cam get invited to an exclusive event.

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube Shorts
programme.desc: A short, cheeky clip featuring animals and food, from the always hilarious Tube that is Rude.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Le Bistro: Gordon visits high-end Le Bistro in Florida. Owner Andy has cooked for top chefs in the past, but he's lost his passion - and he doesn't respond well to criticism.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Returns 1: Gordon revisits three restaurants - Handlebar, Casa Roma and The Black Pearl - to check in with the owners he helped. Has his advice been put to good use?

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Hersheypark: When Adam tells Beverly that he doesn't want her to chaperone the school trip to a theme park, she tries to manipulate him with 'guilt letters'.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Mister Knifey-Hands: Beverly's not happy when Jackie's parents let Adam watch A Nightmare on Elm Street. Erica hangs out at her old high school.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: A Year of Birthdays: As the birth of Haley and Dylan's twins approaches, the family look back at how each of them celebrated their birthdays this past year.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: New Kids on the Block: Haley is determined to follow the advice in her parenting books with the twins, but Phil and Claire think their old methods are better.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Returns 2: Gordon Ramsay revisits two restaurants - Giuseppi's and Sante La Brea - to find out whether his advice has been put to good use.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Spanish Pavillion: Gordon Ramsay visits Spanish Pavillion, a family-run restaurant whose owners, brothers Michael and Jerry, spend more time struggling for power than working.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The Fugitive (Part 1/2): When a prison van crashes, loads of convicts escape and the squad must track them down.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The Fugitive (Part 2/2): Peralta must ask a surprising ally to help catch the only escaped prisoner who's still on the loose.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Take My Life, Please: Homer is annoyed when his old high school nemesis Vance Connor gets a spot on the Springfield Walk of Fame.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Pokey Mom: Marge notices a prison inmate's artistic talent and helps him to get a job painting a mural at the school. But he clashes with Skinner. Michael Keaton guest stars.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Major League'd: Adam is terrified when he and his friends are recruited to the school baseball team. Geoff's father interferes in his relationship with Erica.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: My Valentine Boy: Erica and Valley Erica find a new band member to replace Lainey. Adam and Murray plot to escape from Valentine's Day dinner with Beverly.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The Prescott: Alex's new company puts her up at a luxury apartment with full amenities and famous neighbours - and the family are keen to make the most of it...

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Legacy: Phil visits his dad to make sure he's OK after hearing some concerning news. Meanwhile, Jay gives Claire and Mitch a bunch of their old childhood memorabilia.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The Bank Job: Peralta and Diaz learn that there's more to Lt Melanie Hawkins' team than meets the eye as they hunt for the gang of bank robbers.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Crime & Punishment: Peralta and Diaz are framed for a crime they didn't commit. Can their Nine-Nine buddies save them from jail!?

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: I'm Goin' to Praiseland: Ned opens a Christian amusement park. At first, the tame religious attractions are unpopular. But then visitors start having visions...

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Simpsons Tall Tales: A hobo regales the family with unique takes on classic American tales starring the Simpsons as Connie Appleseed, Paul Bunyan and Tom Sawyer.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart's in Jail!: When a phone scammer who's pretending to be Bart fools Grampa into giving away $10,000, it's Homer who's the real victim. According to Homer, anyway.

programme.title: MAFS UK Does Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Kristina Goodsell hosts an orange-themed party, with a set from her fave DJ. No red flags here, just one guest dressed as a traffic cone! But who's won the week? (Ep5/5)

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off...
programme.desc: ...for Stand Up To Cancer: Anneka Rice, John Bishop, Nadine Coyle and Ade Adepitan tackle choux buns and make a cake that represents something from their bucket list.

programme.title: Terminator: Dark Fate
programme.desc: (2019) Sci-fi action sequel with Linda Hamilton and Arnold Schwarzenegger. A factory worker is targeted by deadly robot assassins from the future. Thank goodness he's back.

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Married couple Abbie and Charlie are missing one thing from their family: a woman to turn them into a throuple. And glamour puss Chrissie is looking for husband number four.

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Gamer Lauren is looking for her perfect player number two to help her reboot her love life. And Ryan is searching for a silver fox with a dad bod.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Britain's sharpest armchair critics have been watching: The Traitors, Gino's Cooking Up Love, Lady Chatterley's Lover, I Can See Your Voice, Blowing LA and White Christmas.

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Can Kenny and his biceps 'James' and 'Andrew' sweep gym manager Claire off her feet? And will the stars align for former Countdown contestant Jonny and mystical Clare?

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The Bank Job: Peralta and Diaz learn that there's more to Lt Melanie Hawkins' team than meets the eye as they hunt for the gang of bank robbers.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Crime & Punishment: Peralta and Diaz are framed for a crime they didn't commit. Can their Nine-Nine buddies save them from jail!?

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: The Greatest Musical Ever Written: Barry makes fun of Adam for taking part in a school musical. Beverly's job as a substitute teacher causes problems for Erica.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Globetrotters: When Adam creates a video that makes it look as though he and his friends beat Barry at basketball, Barry demands a rematch in the gym.

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride: Revisited
programme.desc: Bride Lauren and music-mad Perry are under the spotlight as they look back on their gig-themed wedding which Perry threw at a popular London music venue. (Ep5)

programme.title: Lego Masters Australia
programme.desc: The Heist: The teams each build their own portion of a city-wide heist, in assorted heist opportunities including a bank, an art gallery, a hotel and the docks.

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube Shorts
programme.desc: Rude Tube's naughty little sister presents a man pretending to be a walrus, an incredible downhill bike run and some computer keyboard hurling.

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: The Aussie Soap One: Australia-born Adam is taking a risk planning an '80s Aussie soap' wedding when his bride-to-be Rachel is hoping for something classy and sophisticated...

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Truth Be Told: After reconnecting on Facebook, Phil invites his old high school girlfriend to drop by the house, but the friendly visit quickly turns into trouble.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Starry Night: Jay and Mitchell set out on their traditional father-son outing to see the meteor showers, but Mitchell is surprised to see that Manny will be joining them.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Game Changer: Mitchell decides to toughen up, Cameron gets involved in a neighbour's marital problems, and it's Jay against Gloria and Manny in chess.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Benched: When Luke and Manny's hot-tempered basketball coach quits in the middle of a game, Jay and Phil both jockey to fill the position.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Grasshopper Also: In Carlstadt, New Jersey, Gordon Ramsay attempts to save the Grasshopper Also, a family-owned Irish restaurant that's on its last legs.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Davide: In Boston, Gordon Ramsay visits Davide, an Italian restaurant that's been run into the ground by brothers Frank and Anthony. Can they learn to trust each other again?

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Cafe Tavolini: In Bridgeport, Connecticut, Gordon Ramsay visits Cafe Tavolini, a restaurant that's being neglected as the couple who run it teeter on the edge of divorce.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Zeke's: In New Orleans, Gordon Ramsay visits a restaurant famed for its Cajun food and loyal locals. But under new ownership, standards have slipped and the customers have left.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lost Verizon: When Bart finds Denis Leary's phone and uses it to make prank calls and accept job offers, Denis comes up with a creative punishment for him.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer and Lisa Exchange Cross Words: Lisa discovers that she has a knack for crosswords and enters a tournament. But Homer thinks he can make money by betting on her to lose.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Mypods and Broomsticks: Homer suspects that Bart's new friend's Muslim family are terrorists. Meanwhile, Lisa becomes addicted to downloading songs on her new Mypod.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Take My Life, Please: Homer is annoyed when his old high school nemesis Vance Connor gets a spot on the Springfield Walk of Fame.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Deep Space Homer: NASA recruit Homer and Barney to make the organisation more appealing to the common man. When Barney has too much to drink, Homer is chosen to go into space.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer Loves Flanders: Homer realises that he likes Flanders and starts to hang around with him all the time. Unfortunately, Flanders realises that he's not so keen on Homer...

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart Gets an Elephant: Bart wins an elephant, but Homer can't afford its upkeep and decides to sell it to an ivory dealer...

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Burns' Heir: When Bart wins a competition to become Mr Burns' heir, he must choose between his boring family and the rich, over-indulgent power plant owner...

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Sweet Seymour Skinner's Baadasssss Song: Bart gets Principal Skinner sacked and Flanders takes over at the school. Out of work, Skinner befriends his erstwhile nemesis Bart.

programme.title: The Greatest Showman
programme.desc: (2017) Hugh Jackman, Zac Efron and Michelle Williams star in the Golden-Globe-winning, toe-tapping smash hit musical about the life and times of P.T. Barnum, who created the circus.

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programme.desc: A bunch of famous faces watch The Piano, Bridgerton, Celebrity Bridge of Lies, UK's Strongest Man 2024, The World's Most Luxurious Retirement Homes and Scam Interceptors.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: What do the Goggleboxers think of Blue Lights, Strictly, Victoria Beckham (on Netflix), Slow Horses, Antiques Roadshow, Eva Longoria: Searching for Spain and Police Interceptors?

programme.title: The Creator
programme.desc: (2023) Sci-fi extravaganza starring John David Washington. An undercover operative must destroy a superweapon in a war against AI. But the superweapon looks like a little girl.

programme.title: A Hidden Life
programme.desc: (2019) Epic World War II drama telling the agonising story of one man's fight for the right to not kill. A conscientious objector from rural Austria refuses to fight for Germany.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Send Me No Flowers
programme.desc: (1964) Romcom starring Rock Hudson and Doris Day. Thinking he has just a few months to live, a man makes his wife suspect he's having an affair when he tries to find her a new partner.

programme.title: Gunman's Walk
programme.desc: (1958) Western. Van Heflin stars as a veteran frontiersman whose determination to mould his sons in his gun-totin' image backfires disastrously. With Tab Hunter and James Darren.

programme.title: Patton
programme.desc: (1970) Multi-Oscar-winning, fact-based, Second World War drama starring George C Scott, who gives a vivid portrait of the famously straight-talking US commander General George Patton.

programme.title: Bridge of Spies
programme.desc: (2015) Tom Hanks and Mark Rylance star in Steven Spielberg's Cold War spy drama. After gaining notoriety for defending a Soviet spy, a US lawyer then tries to free a CIA pilot.

programme.title: Reality
programme.desc: (2023) Tina Satter's tense fact-based whistleblower drama stars Sydney Sweeney (White Lotus) as Reality Winner - a young woman being questioned by the FBI about leaked top-secret documents.

programme.title: Salt
programme.desc: (2010) Action-thriller starring Angelina Jolie. A CIA agent goes on the run after a Russian defector claims that she's a sleeper agent who's about to commit a terrible act of terrorism.

programme.title: Zola
programme.desc: (2020) Dark comedy drama based on a viral Twitter thread. Dancer Zola (Taylour Paige) joins a road trip to Tampa, where she gets dragged too far into the sex work world. Adults only.

programme.title: Shiva Baby
programme.desc: (2020) Comedy-drama. A college student struggles to keep a lid on her secrets as she awkwardly encounters her sugar daddy and the ex-girlfriend she's still hung up on at a shiva.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Ride Lonesome
programme.desc: (1959) Western. Randolph Scott plays a bounty hunter who has unfinished business with the brother of his latest target. But his quest for revenge looks like it could be undermined.

programme.title: Yellow Sky
programme.desc: (1949) Western. Gregory Peck plays the leader of an outlaw gang whose plans to rob an old man and his granddaughter of their gold go seriously awry. With Anne Baxter and Richard Widmark.

programme.title: For Whom the Bell Tolls
programme.desc: (1943) Drama. Director Sam Wood's epic adaptation of Ernest Hemingway's classic story about the Spanish Civil War. Starring Oscar-nominees Gary Cooper and Ingrid Bergman.

programme.title: Monkey Business
programme.desc: (1952) Screwball comedy starring Cary Grant as a scientist who drinks the elixir of youth and starts acting the fool, as does his strait-laced wife (Ginger Rogers).

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: (2004) All-action thriller. Queen Latifah stars as the driver of the fastest taxi in New York, who teams up with an inept cop (Jimmy Fallon) to catch a team of female bank-robbers.

programme.title: The Equalizer
programme.desc: (2014) Thriller. Denzel Washington stars as an ex-soldier who comes out of retirement to help a teenage sex worker who's been assaulted by her pimp.

programme.title: Deja Vu
programme.desc: (2006) Pulsating sci-fi action with Denzel Washington and Val Kilmer. An AFT agent uses new technology to reach back in time, stop a ferry bombing, and save the love of his life. Simple.

programme.title: Undergods
programme.desc: (2020) Dystopian fantasy that weaves together three eerie tales of doomed modernity, framed by the day-to-day of two garbage men who collect corpses from the streets of a ruined estate.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: The Admirable Crichton
programme.desc: (1957) Comedy. Kenneth More stars as the perfect butler, who assumes command when he, his aristocratic employer (Cecil Parker) and his family and friends are shipwrecked on a desert island.

programme.title: The Lavender Hill Mob
programme.desc: (1951) Classic Ealing comedy starring Alec Guinness as a mild-mannered bank clerk who assembles a gang to hijack a million quid's worth of gold. Which is when their problems really start...

programme.title: Annie
programme.desc: (2014) Jamie Foxx stars in this reboot of the 1982 musical. Orphan Annie is transported to post-2008 recession-hit New York, where she becomes the ward of a germaphobe running for mayor.

programme.title: The Day the Earth Stood Still
programme.desc: (2008) Remake of the sci-fi classic with Keanu Reeves. An alien visits Earth to tell humankind to stop destroying the planet. But when he's attacked, he decides to eradicate us instead...

programme.title: Central Intelligence
programme.desc: (2016) Action-comedy with Dwayne Johnson and Kevin Hart. Two former school buddies team up to thwart a terrorist plot. But things may not be as they seem. With Amy Ryan and Jason Bateman.

programme.title: The Menu
programme.desc: (2022) Horror with Ralph Fiennes and Anya Taylor-Joy. Only one diner at an exclusive eatery sees through the foam quenelles to the pile of steaming prairie oysters beyond. Mayhem ensues.

programme.title: Orphan: First Kill
programme.desc: (2022) Horror prequel with Isabelle Fuhrman and Julia Stiles. Diminutive psychopath Esther - think Wednesday at a funeral - cons her way into a family to wreak murderous mayhem.

programme.title: The Creator
programme.desc: (2023) Sci-fi extravaganza starring John David Washington. An undercover operative must destroy a superweapon in a war against AI. But the superweapon looks like a little girl.

programme.title: A Hidden Life
programme.desc: (2019) Epic World War II drama telling the agonising story of one man's fight for the right to not kill. A conscientious objector from rural Austria refuses to fight for Germany.

programme.title: Patrick Christys Tonight
programme.desc: Join Patrick for two hours of spirited debate and news making interviews. Top guests tackle the issues that matter, with a sharp take on every story.

programme.title: Patrick Christys Tonight Late...
programme.desc: Edition. Tomorrow's news, tonight. All the major stories making the front pages and full coverage of all the breaking news at home and abroad with Patrick Christys.

programme.title: The Late Show Live
programme.desc: Live from Washington DC, Bev Turner and Ben Leo bring you the latest from the US and what it means for Britain.

programme.title: Breakfast with Stephen and Ellie
programme.desc: Join Stephen Dixon and Ellie Costello to start your day across the United Kingdom. This is your breakfast show. Join the conversation about what is happening in our nation and the world.

programme.title: Britain's Newsroom
programme.desc: Andrew and Miriam present Monday to Thursday mornings. When the news happens, it happens here. GB News brings you the biggest stories and the answers you need from across the UK.

programme.title: Good Afternoon Britain
programme.desc: Tackling the big stories from all angles and perspectives. Weekdays from midday, Tom Harwood and Dawn Neesom bring you the most compelling stories from across the United Kingdom.

programme.title: Martin Daubney
programme.desc: Join Martin for an up-to-the-minute take on the day's events delivered in his own unique and lively style.

programme.title: Dewbs & Co
programme.desc: Plain-speaking, straight-talking - Michelle delivers her individual take on the day's news.

programme.title: Farage
programme.desc: Nigel Farage doesn't hold back in his GB News prime-time show. Hear his views and give your own in an hour of discussion and debate. Join Nigel as he takes on the big stories other media won't touch.

programme.title: Jacob Rees-Mogg's State Of The Nation
programme.desc: Join Jacob for his unique and unmissable take on the day's news.

programme.desc: Miriam and Alex present every Friday morning. When the news happens, it happens here. But what does it mean for you? GB News brings you the biggest stories and the answers you need from across the UK.

programme.title: Good Afternoon Britain
programme.desc: Tackling the big stories from all angles and perspectives. Weekdays from midday, Tom Harwood and Dawn Neesom bring you the most compelling stories from across the United Kingdom.

programme.title: Martin Daubney
programme.desc: Join Martin for an up-to-the-minute take on the day's events delivered in his own unique and lively style.

programme.title: Dewbs & Co
programme.desc: Plain-speaking, straight-talking - Michelle delivers her individual take on the day's news.

programme.title: Lee Anderson's Real World
programme.desc: Lee Anderson brings the Real World to the Great British public, as the silent majority finally have their voices heard.

programme.title: Friday Night with Matt Goodwin
programme.desc: Britain was once the envy of the world. Join Matt Goodwin as he explores how we fix the problems facing the country.

programme.desc: Join GB News for a fun and friendly look at the news with debates on the topics that really matter to you.

programme.title: The Weekend

programme.title: Nana Akua
